title: Rail Sensor
description: Enables minecart-type entities to detect powered rails and respond to activation state changes. Triggers events when the entity passes over activated or deactivated rails, enabling custom minecart behaviors like launching at boosted speed, stopping at braking rails, or triggering special effects at detector rails.

check_block_types.title: Check Block Types
check_block_types.description:
If true, on tick this entity will trigger its on_deactivate behavior

Sample values:
• command_block_minecart: true

eject_on_activate.title: Eject On Activate
eject_on_activate.description:
If true, this entity will eject all of its riders when it passes over an activated rail

Sample values:
• minecart: true

eject_on_deactivate.title: Eject On Deactivate
eject_on_deactivate.description: If true, this entity will eject all of its riders when it passes over a deactivated rail

on_activate.title: Activate

on_deactivate.title: Deactivate

tick_command_block_on_activate.title: Tick Command Block On Activate
tick_command_block_on_activate.description:
If true, command blocks will start ticking when passing over an activated rail

Sample values:
• command_block_minecart: true

tick_command_block_on_deactivate.title: Tick Command Block On Deactivate
tick_command_block_on_deactivate.description: If false, command blocks will stop ticking when passing over a deactivated rail
